top_signals.title: Indonesia Probes Major Palm Oil Companies on Export Price Issues
top_signals.summary: Indonesia is probing some of the world’s biggest palm-oil companies for suspected export abuses, adding to the upheaval in the industry days after the government announced a plan to nationalize shipments of the crop.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan risks losing out without drug pricing reform, warns AstraZeneca CEO
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reddit stock drops almost 6% after Meta launches standalone app for online forums
top_signals.summary: Reddit shares fell after Meta released a standalone app for Facebook Groups called Forum.

top_signals.title: Ghost CMS SQL injection flaw exploited in large-scale ClickFix campaign
top_signals.summary: A large-scale campaign is exploiting a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-26980) in Ghost CMS to inject malicious JavaScript code that triggers ClickFix attack flows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
